name: Gratitude
description: Prompts to reflect on things you are grateful for.
technical_summary: Provides gratitude prompts from a curated list to encourage positive reflection and memory recall.
prompts: What is one thing that made you smile yesterday?
Think of someone you love. Whats your favorite memory with them?
What is your favorite meal? Who used to make it for you?
Name three things you can see right now that are beautiful.
What sound makes you feel calm and peaceful?
Who is someone that always made you laugh?
What is a place you loved to visit? Imagine you are there right now.
What is the best gift you ever received?
Think about a pet you loved. What was their name?
What season do you enjoy the most? What do you love about it?
